title: inga pruriens
intro: Inga pruriens, also known as the "touch-me-not" or "itching tree", is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Inga pruriens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as potential benefits in managing conditions such as diabetes and high blood pressure. Inga pruriens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
